description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a cluster of slender, woody stems that rise from a rounded, ribbed black pot. The plant has lush, palmate leaves with multiple elongated leaflets radiating from central points, giving it a full and vibrant appearance. The pot is filled with a visible layer of soil or small pebbles at the base of the stems, providing a naturalistic touch. The leaves are a healthy green, with some variation in shade, and are distributed evenly around the plant, creating a balanced, bushy silhouette. The pot itself has a matte, textured finish with horizontal grooves encircling its surface, adding a subtle decorative element. This potted plant would be well-suited for placement on the floor in urban interiors, lobbies, or patios, offering a touch of greenery and life to the environment.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with lush, palmate green leaves and multiple woody stems, set in a ribbed black pot with a matte finish. The plant appears healthy and full, ideal for floor placement in urban spaces.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from a slight angle, showing the ribbed black pot and a dense cluster of green leaves with visible stems.
description_view_1: A more frontal view, highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the leaves and the central grouping of stems in the pot.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the left side of the plant, with the leaves spreading outward and the pot's ribbed texture clearly visible.
description_view_3: The plant is viewed from the right, showing the layered foliage and the pot's rounded shape with its textured surface.
